author: taehwan
name: Autoresearch-Guided Optimization: 100+ Experiments + Negative Results
technique_summary: Systematic autoresearch: 100+ experiments (80 Mac + 10 H100) testing hyperparameters with real Muon optimizer. Key findings: QK-Gain=3.0 helps (-0.002 BPB), MuonEq-R hurts with Parallel Muon, int4/Hadamard not viable, init_std tuning doesn't transfer from AdamW to Muon.
